transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Namaste, main Priya hoon Supreme Petrochemicals Chennai se. Kya aap 30 second baat kar sakte hain?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Haan boliye, main Sunil hoon, purchase manager Brilliant Paints mein

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Theek hai Sunil ji. Aap kaunse chemicals kharidte hain abhi?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Toluene aur titanium dioxide, har mahine 12 tonne se zyada

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Aapke current supplier ke saath koi dikkat hai?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Price thoda zyada hai, aur quality bhi consistent nahi rehti. Hum naya supplier dhoondh rahe hain agle 2 maheene mein

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hum 4 ghante mein quote bhej sakte hain. Email batayenge?
